scripts.bundle:spa: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'..','frontend','build');const dst=p.resolve(__dirname,'dist','public');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.log('[bundle:spa] no frontend build at',src,'\u2014 skipping');process.exit(0);}fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('[bundle:spa] copied',src,'->',dst);"
